# dokku_plugins (Resource)

Manages third-party Dokku plugins installed from git (`dokku plugin:install` / `dokku plugin:uninstall`).



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `plugins` (Map of String) Map of plugin name to the git URL to install it from, e.g. `{ postgres = "https://github.com/dokku/dokku-postgres.git" }`.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
